name: Turmeric & Aloe Whipped Shea Butter Body Butter
image: /assets/Turmeric & Aloe Whipped Shea Butter Body Butter.png
short_description: Turmeric & Aloe Whipped Shea Butter is the perfect selection for skin restoration and protection. Turmeric is used for acne because of its antiseptic and antibacterial properties that fight pimples and breakouts. It removes redness from acne and other types of scarring, reduces inflammation, and evens out skin discolorations. Some people drink the spice as a tea with water or milk to help prevent acne outbreaks. Aloe Vera is also infused into this excellent whipped shea butter, which contains antioxidants, enzymes, Vitamins A and C, and it is highly anti-inflammatory. It also helps to treat burns, acne, and dry skin.
ingredients: Raw Shea Butter, Hempseed Butter, Cocoa Butter, Rosemary Oil, Moringa Oil, Bergamont Oil, 100% Vegetable Base, Aloe Cape Powder, Turmeric Powder, Chamomile Powder, Caffeic Acid, Ginger Powder, Raw Honey, Green Tea Extract, Blackseed
directions: Apply to skin generously. Can be used on wet or dry skin.
qr_education:
🌿 Why Aloe & Turmeric?

These two botanical powerhouses work together to help your skin look and feel its best.

🌱 Aloe Vera helps soothe, hydrate, and nourish your skin while supporting its natural healing process and promoting a healthy, radiant glow.

✨ Turmeric is rich in antioxidants and naturally supports healthy skin by helping reduce the appearance of blemishes, promoting a more even-looking complexion, and supporting overall skin wellness.

Healthy skin starts with consistent care—and nature provides some of its best ingredients.
